mapper.sql: CONVERT(INT, BP_ID) AS id, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END AS enroll_id, CONVERT(INT, FINDEX) AS backupnum, NULL AS imagepath, CAST(FPTMP AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS signatures
CONVERT(INT, BP_ID) AS id, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END AS enroll_id, 50 AS backupnum, NULL AS imagepath, CAST(IMAGE AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS signatures
CONVERT(INT, BU_ID) AS id, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END AS enroll_id, 10 AS backupnum, NULL AS imagepath, PASSWD AS signatures
CONVERT(INT, BU_ID) AS id, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END AS enroll_id, 11 AS backupnum, NULL AS imagepath, CARDNO AS signatures

choose.when:
SELECT TOP 1
FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(PASSWD, '') <> '' ORDER BY BU_ID DESC

SELECT TOP 1
FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(CARDNO, '') <> '' ORDER BY BU_ID DESC

SELECT TOP 1
FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BP_ID DESC

mapper.select:
;WITH active_users AS ( SELECT ID FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 AND CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END IS NOT NULL ), latest_face AS ( SELECT BIO_FACEDATA.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID, FINDEX ORDER BY BP_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_FACEDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(INT, FINDEX) BETWEEN 20 AND 27 ), latest_pic AS ( SELECT BIO_PICDATA.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY BP_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END IS NOT NULL ), latest_user AS ( SELECT BIO_USERMAST.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY BU_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 AND CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END IS NOT NULL ) SELECT
FROM latest_face WHERE rn = 1 AND ID IN (SELECT ID FROM active_users) UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_pic WHERE rn = 1 AND ID IN (SELECT ID FROM active_users) UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_user WHERE rn = 1 AND ISNULL(PASSWD, '') <> '' UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_user WHERE rn = 1 AND ISNULL(CARDNO, '') <> ''

SELECT TOP 1 * FROM ( SELECT
FROM BIO_FACEDATA WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} UNION ALL SELECT
FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} UNION ALL SELECT
FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE BU_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND ISNULL(PASSWD, '') <> '' UNION ALL SELECT
FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE BU_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND ISNULL(CARDNO, '') <> '' ) x

;WITH latest_face AS ( SELECT BIO_FACEDATA.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID, FINDEX ORDER BY BP_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_FACEDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND CONVERT(INT, FINDEX) BETWEEN 20 AND 27 ), latest_pic AS ( SELECT BIO_PICDATA.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY BP_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ), latest_user AS ( SELECT BIO_USERMAST.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY BU_ID DESC) AS rn FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 ) SELECT
FROM latest_face WHERE rn = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_pic WHERE rn = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_user WHERE rn = 1 AND ISNULL(PASSWD, '') <> '' UNION ALL SELECT
FROM latest_user WHERE rn = 1 AND ISNULL(CARDNO, '') <> '' ORDER BY backupnum

choose.when: INSERT INTO BIO_PICDATA (BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, SIZE, IMAGE, UPD_DATE) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() );

INSERT INTO BIO_FACEDATA ( BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, FINDEX, FPSIZE, FPVALID, FPTMP, UPD_DATE ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), #{backupnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), '1', #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() );

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 ) BEGIN UPDATE BIO_USERMAST SET PASSWD = LEFT(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ''), 10), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0; END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO BIO_USERMAST ( TR_DATE, SLNO, ID, NAME, PRI, PASSWD, CARDNO, GRPNO, TZ, ISDELETED, DEL_DATE, UPD_DATE, Verify ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), '0', LEFT(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ''), 10), '', '1', '0000000100000000', 0, NULL, GETDATE(), '-1' ); END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0 ) BEGIN UPDATE BIO_USERMAST SET CARDNO = LEFT(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ''), 20), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ISNULL(ISDELETED, 0) = 0; END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO BIO_USERMAST ( TR_DATE, SLNO, ID, NAME, PRI, PASSWD, CARDNO, GRPNO, TZ, ISDELETED, DEL_DATE, UPD_DATE, Verify ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), '0', '', LEFT(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ''), 20), '1', '0000000100000000', 0, NULL, GETDATE(), '-1' ); END

INSERT INTO BIO_PICDATA (BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, SIZE, IMAGE, UPD_DATE) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() );

INSERT INTO BIO_FACEDATA ( BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, FINDEX, FPSIZE, FPVALID, FPTMP, UPD_DATE ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), #{backupnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), '1', #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() );

choose.otherwise:
UPDATE BIO_FACEDATA SET FPTMP = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, FPSIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), BP_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER};
UPDATE BIO_PICDATA SET IMAGE = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, SIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), BP_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER};

UPDATE BIO_FACEDATA SET FPTMP = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, FPSIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), BP_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER};
UPDATE BIO_PICDATA SET IMAGE = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, SIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), BP_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER};

choose.when: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) BEGIN UPDATE BIO_PICDATA SET IMAGE = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, SIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), UPD_DATE = GETDATE(), BP_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = ( SELECT TOP 1 BP_ID FROM BIO_PICDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BP_ID DESC ); END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO BIO_PICDATA (BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, SIZE, IMAGE, UPD_DATE) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() ); END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BIO_FACEDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND CONVERT(INT, FINDEX) = #{backupnum,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) BEGIN UPDATE BIO_FACEDATA SET FPTMP = #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, FPSIZE = LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), BP_DATE = GETDATE(), UPD_DATE = GETDATE() WHERE BP_ID = ( SELECT TOP 1 BP_ID FROM BIO_FACEDATA WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND CONVERT(INT, FINDEX) = #{backupnum,jdbcType=INTEGER} ORDER BY BP_ID DESC ); END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO BIO_FACEDATA ( BP_DATE, SLNO, ID, FINDEX, FPSIZE, FPVALID, FPTMP, UPD_DATE ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), COALESCE( (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM BIO_USERMAST WHERE CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(ID)=1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, ID) ELSE NULL END = #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BU_ID DESC), (SELECT TOP 1 SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DI_ID DESC) ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), #{backupnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LEN(ISNULL(#{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '')), '1', #{signatures,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, GETDATE() ); END
